name: Text Extraction Analysis CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  run_pipeline:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      #  Clonar el repositorio
      - uses: actions/checkout@v3

      #  Configurar Python
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      # Instalar dependencias
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          echo "No requirements.txt, asegúrate de tener environment.yml localmente"

      #  Crear carpetas necesarias
      - name: Create folders
        run: |
          mkdir -p data/pdf
          mkdir -p data/tei
          mkdir -p results

      #  Ejecutar pipeline principal
      - name: Run main pipeline
        run: |
          python scripts/run_pipeline.py

      #  Ejecutar tests
      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          python -m unittest discover -s test
